Prototype
FILES
Karst VPN — Android (Kotlin + Compose).
VLESS links & subscriptions, sing-box config, VpnService.
— files
— lines
Выберите файл
📂
Выберите файл из дерева слева
-like "sdk.dir=*" } | Select-Object -First 1\\n $AndroidSdk = ($sdkLine -replace "^sdk.dir=", "").Replace("\\\\\\\\", "\\\\")\\n }\\n}\\n\\nif ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($AndroidSdk) -or !(Test-Path -LiteralPath $AndroidSdk)) {\\n throw "Android SDK path not found. Set ANDROID_HOME or sdk.dir in local.properties."\\n}\\n\\nif ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($AndroidNdk)) {\\n $ndkRoot = Join-Path $AndroidSdk "ndk"\\n $AndroidNdk = Get-ChildItem -LiteralPath $ndkRoot -Directory |\\n Sort-Object Name -Descending |\\n Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty FullName\\n}\\n\\nif ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($AndroidNdk) -or !(Test-Path -LiteralPath (Join-Path $AndroidNdk "source.properties"))) {\\n throw "Android NDK path not found. Install an NDK or set ANDROID_NDK_HOME."\\n}\\n\\n$goPath = (& go env GOPATH).Trim()\\n$goBin = Join-Path $goPath "bin"\\n$env:ANDROID_HOME = $AndroidSdk\\n$env:ANDROID_NDK_HOME = $AndroidNdk\\n$env:PATH = "$goBin;$env:PATH"\\n\\ngo install -v github.com/sagernet/gomobile/cmd/gomobile@v0.1.12\\ngo install -v github.com/sagernet/gomobile/cmd/gobind@v0.1.12\\n& (Join-Path $goBin "gomobile.exe") init\\n\\nif (!(Test-Path -LiteralPath $workPath)) {\\n git clone --depth 1 --branch $SingBoxTag https://github.com/SagerNet/sing-box.git $workPath\\n} else {\\n Push-Location -LiteralPath $workPath\\n git fetch --depth 1 origin "refs/tags/$SingBoxTag`:refs/tags/$SingBoxTag"\\n git checkout --detach $SingBoxTag\\n Pop-Location\\n}\\n\\nPush-Location -LiteralPath $workPath\\ngo run ./cmd/internal/build_libbox -target android\\nPop-Location\\n\\nNew-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path (Split-Path -Parent $outputPath) | Out-Null\\nCopy-Item -LiteralPath (Join-Path $workPath "libbox.aar") -Destination $outputPath -Force\\nGet-Item -LiteralPath $outputPath\\n', }; // ── BUILD TREE ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── let totalLines = 0; let fileCount = 0; function buildTree() { const root = {}; const sorted = Object.keys(FILES).sort(); for (const path of sorted) { const parts = path.split('/'); let node = root; for (let i = 0; i < parts.length; i++) { const part = parts[i]; const isFile = i === parts.length - 1; if (isFile) { node[part] = { _path: path }; fileCount++; totalLines += FILES[path].split('\n').length; } else { if (!node[part]) node[part] = {}; node = node[part]; } } } document.getElementById('fileCount').textContent = fileCount; document.getElementById('totalLines').textContent = totalLines; return root; } function renderTree(node, container, depth = 0) { if (node._path) return; // leaf handled by parent const keys = Object.keys(node).sort((a, b) => { const aDir = typeof node[a] === 'object' && !node[a]._path; const bDir = typeof node[b] === 'object' && !node[b]._path; if (aDir && !bDir) return -1; if (!aDir && bDir) return 1; return a.localeCompare(b); }); for (const key of keys) { const val = node[key]; const isFile = val._path !== undefined; const el = document.createElement('div'); el.className = 'tree-item ' + (isFile ? 'file' : 'dir'); el.style.paddingLeft = (depth * 12 + 8) + 'px'; el.innerHTML = (isFile ? '📄' : '📁') + htmlEscape(key); if (isFile) { el.dataset.path = val._path; el.onclick = (e) => { e.stopPropagation(); openFile(val._path); selectTreeItem(el); }; } container.appendChild(el); if (!isFile) renderTree(val, container, depth + 1); } } let activeTreeItem = null; function selectTreeItem(el) { if (activeTreeItem) activeTreeItem.classList.remove('active'); activeTreeItem = el; el.classList.add('active'); } // ── FILE VIEWER ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── function openFile(path) { const code = FILES[path]; if (code === undefined) return; document.getElementById('fileName').textContent = path; document.getElementById('langTag').textContent = getLanguage(path); const area = document.getElementById('codeArea'); area.innerHTML = '
' + code.split('\n').map(line =>
    '' + htmlEscape(line || ' ') + ''
  ).join('\n') + '
'; } function getLanguage(path) { if (path.endsWith('.kt')) return 'kotlin'; if (path.endsWith('.kts')) return 'kotlin'; if (path.endsWith('.xml')) return 'xml'; if (path.endsWith('.json') || path.endsWith('.jsonc')) return 'json'; if (path.endsWith('.toml')) return 'toml'; if (path.endsWith('.yml') || path.endsWith('.yaml')) return 'yaml'; if (path.endsWith('.pro')) return 'proguard'; if (path.endsWith('.md')) return 'markdown'; if (path.endsWith('.ps1')) return 'powershell'; if (path.endsWith('.properties')) return 'properties'; return 'text'; } function htmlEscape(s) { return s.replace(/&/g,'&').replace(//g,'>').replace(/"/g,'"'); } // ── INIT ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── const root = buildTree(); renderTree(root, document.getElementById('tree'));
